name: libemu
description: Shellcode emulation library, useful for shellcode detection. Tool: https://github.com/buffer/libemu. [SCAFFOLD generated from XORCISM.TOOL #620 by tool_to_connector.py — implement run() in run.py to map libemu output to the XORCISM findings model {assets, services, cpes, vulns}.]

parameters.name: target

parameters.name: file
